caption: A man with white hair and a white beard, wearing glasses, a cream-colored long-sleeved shirt, and a sleeveless white vest, stands behind a brown wooden podium. He is delivering a speech in front of a dark green textured wall with geometric patterns. To his right, a gold-trimmed cylindrical pillar contains a floral arrangement. Two thin microphones are positioned on the podium in front of him. In the initial scene, he speaks with an open-mouthed expression, gesturing with both hands outward. As the sequence progresses, he lowers his hands, clasping them together in front of him. He continues to speak, shifting his gaze slightly and subtly adjusting his posture while maintaining his position behind the podium. The background and setting remain constant throughout the clip.
